name: Jersey Shore
description_short: Jersey Shore Federal Credit Union operates a Northfield, NJ branch offering credit union banking services. Contact them at (609) 646-3339 for hours and account information.
description_long:
Jersey Shore Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving the New Jersey area with at least one physical branch location in Northfield. Like most credit unions, it operates on a not-for-profit basis, returning earnings to members rather than external shareholders. The organization is listed through the National Credit Union Service Organization (NCUSO), a directory and service provider for credit unions nationwide.

Based on the available information, Jersey Shore Federal Credit Union provides traditional banking services typical of credit union membership, including access to a physical branch for deposits, withdrawals, and account management. The Northfield office is located at 1434 New Rd, Northfield, NJ 08225, and serves as a member service center. The website does not specify which financial products are offered, such as checking accounts, savings accounts, loans, or credit cards, though credit unions typically provide these core services.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Jersey Shore Federal Credit Union distinguishes itself through member ownership and democratic governance. Credit unions generally offer competitive rates on savings products and lower fees compared to large commercial banks. The organization's presence in NCUSO's directory indicates it maintains standards and compliance oversight expected of federally or state-chartered credit unions.

Consumers interested in this institution should contact the Northfield branch directly at (609) 646-3339 to confirm membership eligibility requirements, available products, interest rates, and fees. The website provides minimal detail about specific offerings, so a phone call is necessary to understand whether this credit union meets your financial needs. Location and accessibility are strengths for those in the Northfield area.
pros: Physical branch location in Northfield, NJ for in-person service
Credit union structure typically offers competitive rates and lower fees than large banks
Member-owned cooperative model returns profits to account holders
Listed on NCUSO directory indicating regulatory compliance and standards
Direct phone line provided for account inquiries and service questions
cons: Website provides minimal information about specific products, rates, or fees
Membership eligibility requirements not disclosed online
Limited branch visibility suggests smaller institution with fewer locations
No details about loan types, credit cards, or investment products available
Hours of operation not listed on website, requiring phone contact
best_for: Residents of Northfield, NJ seeking local credit union banking
Individuals who qualify for credit union membership in the service area
Members seeking traditional banking with lower fees than major banks
diagnosis: Jersey Shore Federal Credit Union is best for residents of Northfield, NJ who qualify for membership and prefer traditional banking through a not-for-profit credit union. The main caveat is that the website provides almost no detail about specific products, rates, or eligibility—direct phone contact is essential before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
